name: Beads
description: Granular texture synthesizer succeeding Clouds. Higher-quality buffer, stereo spread, built-in delay/reverb, three quality presets, and two dedicated outputs for wet-only and summed signals.

controls.name: Quality
controls.description: Three-way button cycles buffer quality: CD (stereo 32kHz) · AM (mono 32kHz) · tape (mono 16kHz with wow/flutter and saturation).
controls.detail: Green=CD · orange=AM · red=tape · hold to freeze the buffer

controls.name: Freeze
controls.description: Long-press Quality button or FREEZE gate locks the recording buffer. Grains continue reading the frozen material.
controls.detail: LED flashes while frozen · same gate also mutes input to avoid feedback crash

controls.name: Time
controls.description: Buffer scrubbing position and grain start. CCW = oldest material, CW = newest. Also controls internal reverb decay when in reverb-emphasis mode.

controls.name: Pitch
controls.description: Grain pitch transposition. Stepped in semitones when V/OCT is patched; continuous otherwise.
controls.detail: ±2 octaves · stepped in semitones when V/OCT in · continuous when not

controls.name: Size
controls.description: Grain length. Small = crisp/percussive, large = stretched/ambient. Accepts audio-rate CV for FM-like artifacts.

controls.name: Density
controls.description: Grain rate. Center = silent. CW = regular/synchronous. CCW = Poisson/random. Doubles as macro trigger source when DENSITY CV not patched.
controls.detail: Bipolar · center = silence · CCW random · CW synchronous · normalled to internal trigger source

controls.name: Texture
controls.description: Grain envelope shape. CCW = boxcar (clicky), CW = Gaussian (smooth). Interacts with spread and reverb routing depending on macro.

controls.name: Seed
controls.description: Button randomizes grain-parameter variation pattern. Holding + turning another knob changes that parameter's randomness depth.
controls.detail: Tap = new seed · hold+knob = per-parameter randomness

controls.name: Macros (x2)
controls.description: Two attenuverter-style controls determine how the internal trigger, delay send, reverb send, and stereo spread are blended into the L/R macro outputs.
controls.detail: Sets balance dry : granular : delay : reverb in L/R outs

controls.name: In Gain
controls.description: Input trim with peak LED. Feeds both buffer write and the dry path.
controls.detail: Unity at noon · up to +24dB CW · peak LED at ~0dBFS

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: External grain trigger. Each pulse fires one grain at the TIME position. Overrides DENSITY as source.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: 1V/oct for grain pitch transposition. When patched, PITCH knob quantizes to semitones.

inputs.name: TIME CV
inputs.description: CV for buffer position, scaled by attenuverter.

inputs.name: SIZE CV
inputs.description: CV for grain size; accepts audio-rate.

inputs.name: DENSITY CV
inputs.description: CV for grain rate and random distribution.

inputs.name: SEED
inputs.description: Trigger input that generates a new randomization seed for grain parameter variation.

inputs.name: IN L / IN R
inputs.description: Stereo audio inputs. Left normalized to right.
inputs.normalizedTo: IN L feeds IN R when unpatched

outputs.name: OUT L / OUT R
outputs.description: Stereo macro outputs. Mix of dry, granular, delay, and reverb determined by the two macro knobs.

behaviors.name: Three buffer qualities
behaviors.description: CD: 32kHz 16-bit stereo, clean. AM: 32kHz mono, slight saturation. Tape: 16kHz with wow/flutter + saturation. Each mode has a different sonic signature — Tape is the Clouds-heritage lo-fi voice.

behaviors.name: Self-triggering from DENSITY
behaviors.description: With no external TRIG, grains fire from an internal source driven by DENSITY. Around center no grains fire; CW produces regular pulses, CCW produces random Poisson events. Audio-rate DENSITY CV modulates grain rate at audio rate.

behaviors.name: Seed-based variation
behaviors.description: Each grain's parameters wobble around the set values. SEED chooses the random pattern — same seed produces repeatable wobble. Holding Seed + turning any parameter sets that parameter's variation amount.

behaviors.name: Macro routing
behaviors.description: The OUT L and OUT R macros blend dry / granular / delay / reverb according to the macro knob positions — a user-programmable 4-to-2 mixer. Lets Beads output wet-only at one position and dry+grains at another.

behaviors.name: Integrated delay and reverb
behaviors.description: Beads contains a feedback delay and a shimmer-friendly reverb that share DSP with the grain engine. These effects are always running; only the macro blend controls how much they reach the outs.

behaviors.name: V/OCT quantizes PITCH
behaviors.description: When V/OCT is patched, the PITCH knob snaps to semitones so you can set an exact transposition over an incoming pitch CV. Unpatching restores continuous pitch.

behaviors.name: Audio-rate SIZE modulation
behaviors.description: Audio-rate grain-size modulation produces FM-like sidebands and metallic artifacts — inherited from Clouds but cleaner in CD quality.

behaviors.name: Tape-quality wow/flutter
behaviors.description: Tape mode adds pitch-modulated buffer readout simulating mechanical instability, plus soft-clip saturation on input. Closest Beads gets to Clouds' original character.

behaviors.name: Freeze mutes write bus
behaviors.description: When frozen, input audio is no longer written to the buffer but dry path still passes. Prevents feedback buildup when patching Beads' output back into its input.

patchIdeas.name: Tape-lofi loop
patchIdeas.patch: Quality: Tape · drum loop into IN L · Freeze after two bars · SIZE ~3 o'clock · DENSITY ~2 o'clock · Macros set mostly granular+reverb · wow/flutter and saturation turn the frozen loop into a hazy cassette texture
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Quality: Tape
* Freeze: ON
* Size: ~3 o'clock
* Density: ~2 o'clock

- Drum Loop (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Quantized granular lead
patchIdeas.patch: Quality: CD · V/OCT from sequencer (PITCH now semitone-quantized) · gate into TRIG (one grain per note) · SIZE small, DENSITY CCW-random for roll feel · macro-right emphasizes reverb for airy lead voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Quality: CD

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Beads (V/OCT)
- Sequencer (Gate) t> Beads (TRIG)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Frozen shimmer pad
patchIdeas.patch: Quality: CD · chord stab into IN · FREEZE gate on · DENSITY CW (thick cloud) · PITCH +12 semitones (octave up shimmer) · Seed triggered slowly by LFO for evolving clusters · macros full wet
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Quality: CD
* Pitch: +12 semitones

- Chord (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- Clock (Gate) g> Beads (FREEZE)
- LFO (Slow) t> Beads (SEED)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate SIZE FM bells
patchIdeas.patch: Quality: CD · held tone into IN · Freeze ON · VCO square into SIZE CV · metallic FM partials emerge from grain interruption · macros granular-forward · V/OCT for tuned bells
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Quality: CD
* Freeze: ON

- Held Tone (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- VCO (Square) >> Beads (SIZE CV) // audio-rate
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Beads (V/OCT)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Mixer (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Dual-macro wet/dry mix
patchIdeas.patch: Macro L set dry-heavy (for rhythm), Macro R set wet-granular (for ambient tail) · rhythm loop into IN · OUT L into main mix, OUT R into reverb-heavy aux · Beads acts as dry/wet split with internal FX
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Macro L: dry-heavy
* Macro R: granular/reverb

- Loop (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Mixer (Main)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Mixer (Aux Reverb)

patchIdeas.name: Stochastic grain sprays
patchIdeas.patch: TRIG unpatched · DENSITY full CCW (Poisson / random) · SIZE small · SEED stepped by slow clock for varying wobble pattern · drum loop in · produces glitchy stochastic re-shuffle of the input
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Density: full CCW (Poisson)
* Size: small

- Drum Loop (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- Clock (Slow) t> Beads (SEED)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Pitch-tracked granular delay
patchIdeas.patch: Quality: CD · V/OCT from sequencer · TRIG from clock · macros lean heavily on internal delay · TIME CV slightly modulated by LFO · each note plays as a pitched tape-delay grain with built-in shimmer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Quality: CD
* Macros: delay-heavy

- Source (Out) -> Beads (IN L)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Beads (V/OCT)
- Clock (Out) t> Beads (TRIG)
- LFO (Slow) >> Beads (TIME CV)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Self-seeding reverb drone
patchIdeas.patch: Input briefly, then unpatched · Freeze ON · macros set reverb+granular only · SEED jack self-patched from an LFO · the frozen buffer keeps mutating through new random parameter sets · long evolving drone
patchIdeas.diagram:
Beads:
* Freeze: ON
* Macros: reverb + granular

- Source (Out) -> Beads (IN L) // briefly, then unpatch
- LFO (Out) t> Beads (SEED)
- Beads (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Beads (OUT R) -> Output (R)
